zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl Morgan於大約1462年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾藍斯同時，她的父親Morgan ap Jenkin64歲，母親Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew23歲。她於1483年與Sir John St John Jr在威爾士蒙姆爾藍斯同結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1524年在威爾士格拉莫爾根可迪享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl Morgan于大约1462年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾藍斯同时，她的父亲Morgan ap Jenkin64岁，母亲Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew23岁。她于1483年与Sir John St John Jr在威尔士蒙姆爾藍斯同结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1524年在威尔士格拉莫爾根可迪享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl Morgan was born about 1462, in Langstone, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Morgan ap Jenkin, was 64 and her mother, Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew, was 23. She married Sir John St John Jr in 1483, in Langstone, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1524, in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl Morgan est née environ 1462, à Langstone, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Morgan ap Jenkin, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John St John Jr en 1483, à Langstone, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1524, à Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl Morgan um 1462 in Langstone, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Morgan ap Jenkin 64 und ihre Mutter Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew 23. Sie hat 1483 in Langstone, Monmouthshire, Wales Sir John St John Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1524 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Morgan è nata il circa 1462 nel Langstone, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Morgan ap Jenkin, aveva 64 anni e sua madre, Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John St John Jr nel 1483, nel Langstone, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1524, nel Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl Morganが約1462年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラングストーンで生まれた時，父Morgan ap Jenkinは64歳，母Margred ferch Dafydd Mathewは23歳であった。1483年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラングストーンでSir John St John Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1524年にウェールズグラモーガンコイトイで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl Morgan(이)가 대략 1462년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랭스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Morgan ap Jenkin(은)는 64세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1483년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랭스톤에서 Sir John St John Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1524년 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bletsoe Bedfordshire,England: Bletsoe, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl Morgan nasceu aproximadamente 1462, em Langstone, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Morgan ap Jenkin, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John St John Jr em 1483, em Langstone, Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1524, em Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl Morgan родилась около 1462 г. в местности лангстоун, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Morgan ap Jenkin было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John St John Jr в 1483 г. в местности лангстоун, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1524 г. в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 64 лет.

sm.about 1462–about 1524: e tusa o le 1462–e tusa o le 1524

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibyl Morgan nació aproximadamente 1462, en Langstone, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Morgan ap Jenkin, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Margred ferch Dafydd Mathew, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John St John Jr en 1483, en Langstone, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1524, en Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 64 años.
